◎简　　介  

　　瑞雯和切尔西是两个离婚的单身女性，她们住在一所房子里抚养各自的孩子。有一天瑞雯的一个孩子发现自己继承了ta妈妈预知未来的本领，整个大家庭顿时陷入异常混乱。Raven and Chelsea are now divorced single mothers raising their two separate families in one chaotic, but fun household full of friends. When one of Raven's kids begins to show signs that they have inherited her trait of seeing into the future, the already hectic household gets turned upside down, kee...
